# Email address negative corpus — one text snippet per line
# Each line MUST NOT cause emailDetector.scan() to return any finding.
Schedule a call this Tuesday at 3pm in the conference room.
Our headquarters is at 123 Main Street, New York, NY 10001.
The software version is 2.3.4-beta.1, released last quarter.
Error 404: Page not found at /api/users/list.
Server uptime: 99.9% over the last 30-day period.
Follow @shieldme on social media for product updates.
Visit our website at https://www.shieldme.io/docs/getting-started.
The meeting was attended by Alice, Bob, and Carol.
Invoice total: $1,234.56 due by January 31st.
IP address 192.168.1.100 on port 8080 is unreachable.
The API returned HTTP status code 200 OK.
Database backup completed at midnight on Sunday.
Your order #ORD-2024-001 has been shipped via express.
The department store opens at 9am and closes at 9pm.
GPS coordinates: 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W (Manhattan).
Please read the full documentation at docs.company.com.
The engineering team has 15 members and 3 designers.
Your subscription auto-renews on the 15th of next month.
The log file was last modified on 2024-01-15 at 14:30:00 UTC.
Please enter your username to reset your account access.
Server responded with HTTP/1.1 301 Moved Permanently.
System specs: 16 GB RAM, 512 GB SSD, quad-core CPU.
The zip code for that district is 10001.
Product code: XJ-A1234-5678-90B is now discontinued.
user@localhost is not a valid internet address.
Contact @admin via the internal Slack channel.
The @mention goes to the on-call engineer tonight.
Username format: first.last (no domain required).
An IP like 10.0.0.1 is not an email address.
Internal tools use token-based auth, not email logins.
